---
title: "Interests"
---

<br>

```{r out.width = "50%", fig.align = "center", echo = FALSE}
#knitr::include_graphics("Social.jpg")
```

<br>

## More about me

Outside of research, I enjoy traveling, photography, salsa dancing, podcasts, and cheering for my favorite teams (Go blue and go Hawks!). I am also passionate about combining my academic interests with public good, including outreach efforts such as [Girls Who Code](http://umich.edu/~girlswc/) and [Statistics in the Community (Statcom)](https://sph.umich.edu/biostat/statcom/).

## Beyond Type One

Currently I am training for my first marathon! I am a part of the Beyond Type Run charity team to raise awareness and increase resources for type one diabetics. You can [read more about my story and help support here.](https://donate.beyondtype1.org/fundraiser/4021305) Diabetes has played a major role in my life, including in my academic pursuits toward being involved in meaningful and impactful medical research. I'm always happy to share more about my journey.
